description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for device-level analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Device category of the user: desktop / mobile / tablet. Primary dimension for device segmentation.
Number of key/conversion events (goal completions) recorded on this device category.
Total number of users (new + returning) who used this device category.
Total number of all GA4 events fired on this device category.
Number of first-time users on this device category.
Ratio of engaged sessions to total sessions (0.0–1.0). Multiply by 100 for percentage. Higher = more engaging.
Number of sessions lasting 10+ seconds or with a conversion or 2+ page views on this device.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
Total revenue attributed to sessions on this device category (in account currency).
